name: Bread

name: Boat (tier 1)
description: A tier-1 relic. A tiny vessel made for a forgotten rite.

name: Old Game (tier 1)
description: A tier-1 relic. The rules were lost before the pieces were.

name: Bird Statue (tier 1)
description: A tier-1 relic. Its watcher was carved with patient hands.

name: Skyglass Shard (tier 2)
description: A tier-2 relic. Blue glass catches light along its broken notch.

name: Moontear Ring (tier 2)
description: A tier-2 relic. A crescent frame holds a cold tear of glass.

name: Broken Drop (tier 2)
description: A tier-2 relic. The charm is cracked, but the core still answers.

name: Omen Kite (tier 2)
description: A tier-2 relic. Its cloth spines were made to read unlucky winds.

name: Crescent Reliquary (tier 3)
description: A tier-3 relic. The silver crescent holds a moon-cold core.

name: Broken Halo Idol (tier 3)
description: A tier-3 relic. Its halo is broken, but the idol still burns with old faith.

name: Tri-Spire Reliquary (tier 3)
description: A tier-3 relic. Three spires guard a sealed ritual ember.

name: Bell Tower Casket (tier 3)
description: A tier-3 relic. A tiny tower built over a silent shrine bell.

name: Twin-Spire Sigil (tier 4)
description: A tier-4 relic. Two spires press an old seal around a dark altar mark.

name: Celestial Astrolabe (tier 4)
description: A tier-4 relic. Its rings chart skies that no living sailor has seen.

name: Black Sun Reliquary (tier 5)
description: A tier-5 relic. The black sun burns behind a ring of sacred gold.

name: Rice
description: A handful of raw rice grains.

name: Cooked Rice
description: A bowl of cooked rice. Heals 2 HP.

name: Crystal Staff
description: A staff crafted from pure crystal, humming with magical energy.

name: Evil token (tier 1)
description: A token imbued with faint evil energy. Used as a resource for evil magic.
